global_description: A medium-sized seabird with a slender, streamlined body and long, pointed wings. It features a predominantly white body with a light gray back and wings. The head is capped with a distinctive black crest, and the bill is long, slender, and bright orange. The legs are short and black.

part_details.body: Streamlined, predominantly white with a light gray back.
part_details.wings: Long, pointed, light gray with white undersides.
part_details.head: White with a distinctive black crest.

spatial_relations: The black crest is positioned on top of the head.
The long wings extend from the sides of the body.
The bright orange bill protrudes from the front of the head.
